description: The most bustling commercial street in Suzhou, featuring numerous time-honored brands and local delicacies, making it an ideal place to experience Suzhou life.
A classical garden within Tongli Ancient Town, renowned for its association with the Kunqu opera 'The Pearl Pagoda.'
The latest constructed garden among Suzhou's classical gardens, incorporating the essence of various garden styles.
A small yet exquisite Qing Dynasty garden, recognized as a UNESCO World Heritage Site for its paired layout design.

attraction_name: Pingjiang Road Historical and Cultural Block
description: The best-preserved ancient street district in Suzhou, featuring Ming and Qing Dynasty buildings along the river, with enchanting night views.
The most delicate small garden among Suzhou's classical gardens, praised as the pinnacle of small garden design.
A perfect blend of modern architecture designed by I. M. Pei and classical gardens, showcasing the essence of Jiangnan culture.
A famous Taoist temple in Suzhou, originally built during the Western Han Dynasty, and a landmark of Guanqian Street.
The premier scenic spot in Wu County, featuring the millennium-old Yunyan Temple Pagoda, combining natural landscapes with cultural attractions.
